name: easy-parse
title: Easy Parse
description: Auto-detect and structure JSON / JSONL from clipboard, selection, or manual input.
author: vann

commands.name: parse-clipboard
commands.title: Parse Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Easy Parse
commands.description: Auto-detect and structure JSON / JSONL from clipboard

commands.name: parse-input
commands.title: Parse Input
commands.subtitle: Easy Parse
commands.description: Open an editor to paste or type JSON / JSONL, then parse it

preferences.name: maxBytes
preferences.title: Max input size (bytes)
preferences.description: Inputs larger than this are truncated in the preview (5 MB by default).

preferences.name: autoRepair
preferences.title: Lenient repair
preferences.label: Auto-apply lenient repair on parse error
preferences.description: When enabled, parse errors are silently retried via jsonrepair.

preferences.name: historyEnabled
preferences.title: Clipboard history
preferences.label: Remember the last few parsed clipboards
preferences.description: When enabled, successful parses are cached so you can switch back with ⌘⇧H.

preferences.name: historyMaxEntries
preferences.title: History size
preferences.description: Maximum number of clipboard entries to keep (1-50).

preferences.name: historyMaxBytes
preferences.title: History entry size limit (bytes)
preferences.description: Clipboard payloads larger than this are not added to history (~100 KB by default).

preferences.name: pathStyle
preferences.title: Default path copy format
preferences.description: Format used when copying a node's path.
